emails.subject: FW: EOL products
emails.body: FW: EOL products Scott, Now that Brad and Pete are gone, who do you want to do thier products that we had set them up on previously? Thanks. Scott 3-6599 To: Love, Phillip M.; Winfree, O'Neal D.; Palmer, B. Scott; Giron, Darron C.

emails.subject: RE: EOL products
emails.body: RE: EOL products Jon Mckay will manage Brad's products. What products had we assigned to Pete? To: Neal, Scott

emails.subject: RE: EOL products
emails.body: Here is a list of Pete's EOL products. Thanks. To: Palmer, B. Scott

emails.subject: RE: EOL products
emails.body: I think chuck will do these To: Neal, Scott
